primary_diagnosis: The frozen behavior-distinct policy is exercised, but it collapses to contribution_leader + break with owner_proposal_select or shrinkage behavior and never preserves/trusts best_reward_select, so it overcorrects away from the CEC F13/F14 regimes where best_reward_select is favored.
repair_direction: Add an overcorrection guard or conditional owner-trust path before any formal panel; do not rerun 25 times until this diagnosis is addressed.
